sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current player position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"id={n['id']} color={n['color']} boundary={n['boundary']} children={n['children']}")
        # Check child color
        for cid in n['children']:
            child = next((x for x in seg['nodes'] if x['id'] == cid), None)
            if child:
                print(f"  child: color={child['color']} boundary={child['boundary']}")

# Check bottom bar
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['boundary'] and n['boundary'][0][0] == 63:
        print(f"Bottom bar: color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
